title: hypericum fasciculatum
intro: Hypericum fasciculatum, also known as the bushy St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hypericum fasciculatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for medicinal use, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
